default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to discuss content marketing strategy for Fathom, a legal AI company](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fathom needs to turn on inbound marketing engine, become thought leader in legal AI space](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Target audience: Personal injury/medical malpractice law firms (10-100 employees), mostly owner-operated](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Cold calling working well, but need to differentiate from competitors and educate market on AI](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content strategy should position Fathom as authoritative resource on legal AI, with mix of technical and practical content](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Efforts

  - [11 SDRs doing cold outreach, working well as lawyers receptive to calls](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Recently started Google Ads campaign](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Conferences are key channel, especially for larger firms](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Little qualification currently, but starting to implement pain-point discovery](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Personal injury, medical malpractice, mass tort law firms](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [10-100 employees, owner-operated firms ideal](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [U.S. only, proportional to state populations](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Not targeting solos or very large firms yet](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Looking for growth-minded firms (e.g. investing in marketing, hiring)](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)

### Product Value Proposition

  - [Automates intake to demand letter process, reducing manual work](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Improves predictability, accuracy, and speed of case processing](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Allows firms to take on more cases and grow revenue](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Reduces risk of human error in critical legal documents](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Eveup, Supeo, Evelico (all well-funded)](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
  - [Some competition from horizontal players like Westlaw, LexisNexis](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2748.0)
  - [Many firms not using any AI solution yet, big education opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Position Fathom as authoritative resource on legal AI](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
  - [Educate market on AI capabilities and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2823.0)
  - [Provide practical, valuable content for law firm operations](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2841.0)
  - [Differentiate from competitors through depth and quality](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Mix of technical and business-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)

### Execution Plan

  - [GrowthX to ingest all available info, do competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2982.0)
  - [Develop personas, topic clusters, and content strategy in next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
  - [Calibration process to nail tone/style (serious but approachable)](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3147.0)
  - [Aim for efficient, dense content that's easily skimmable but detailed](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Fathom to provide access to customer for interview if possible](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2931.0)
  - [Share any existing analytics, documentation, customer data](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on recurring meeting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3068.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin research and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3082.0)
  - [Reconvene in 1-2 weeks to review initial strategy and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/sXxvdqpfVuC1xgvpFrQxFiL7_W6Nx-ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
